chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 177 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.934/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.935/2020. 03.10.2025 Malik Naeem Iqbal, advocate files Power on behalf of applicant which is taken on record. 1. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&3. Counsel states that the matter is of remand therefore, it may be just and proper for the reference to be disposed of with directions that the adjudicating officer may decide the lis uninfluenced by any observation. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
